title: Murine CD8 T Cell Transduction
author: Kristin Anderson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.smrec56

steps.title: Gently remove PLAT-E media and rinse...
steps.instruction: Gently remove PLAT-E media and rinse PLAT-E cells with 1x DPBS.

steps.title: Gently remove PBS and add 0
steps.instruction: Gently remove PBS and add 0.05% Trypsin. Trypsinize at 37C for 1-2 minutes or until cells being to lift off the plate with a gentle tap.

steps.title: Dilute and inactivate trypsin with 10ml PLAT-E media
steps.instruction: Dilute and inactivate trypsin with 10ml PLAT-E media.Transfer cells to a conical tube, spin down @ 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend PLAT-E cells in 10mL PLAT-E media
steps.instruction: Resuspend PLAT-E cells in 10mL PLAT-E media. Count cells. Make new 10 cm plates with 2.2e6 cells per plate in 10ml PLAT-E media. Cells: Quadrants: Dilution: Calculation of concentration: Calculation of cells to add: Volume of cells per plate: Media per plate:

steps.title: Return plates to 37C incubator. DNA to transduce
steps.instruction: Return plates to 37C incubator. DNA to transduce: Number of plates prepared:

steps.title: Thaw tubes of DNA
steps.instruction: Thaw tubes of DNA. And prepare 5mL polypropylene tubes (1/plate).

steps.title: Add 300 uL EC Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 300 uL EC Buffer.

steps.title: Add 2ug DNA to EC Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 2ug DNA to EC Buffer. Record DNA amounts to add for each construct:

steps.title: Add 16uL of Enhancer and vortex for 1 second
steps.instruction: Add 16uL of Enhancer and vortex for 1 second.

steps.title: Incubate 5 min at Room Temp
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 min at Room Temp.

steps.title: Add 60uL of Effectene
steps.instruction: Add 60uL of Effectene. Vortex for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Incubate 10 min at Room Temp
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min at Room Temp.

steps.title: Aspirate media from PLAT-E plates
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from PLAT-E plates. Add 7mL of T cell media to each plate.

steps.title: Add 3 mL of T cell...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL of T cell media to each tube of Effectene mixture. Pipette up and down to mix, then add slowly (dropwise) to each PLAT-E plate.

steps.title: Swirl gently to mix and return to 37C incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Swirl gently to mix and return to 37C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Aspirate media from PLAT-E plates and replace with 10
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from PLAT-E plates and replace with 10.5 mL T cell media .

steps.title: Place the plates in the 32C incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Place the plates in the 32C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Harvest T cells by smashing donor...
steps.instruction: Harvest T cells by smashing donor spleens through a 40um filter. Rinse and transfer to a 15 or 50 mL tube. Number of spleens: Donor mice information:

steps.title: Spin down T cells down @369xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down T cells down @369xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Aspirate media and lyse spleens with...
steps.instruction: Aspirate media and lyse spleens with 2ml/spleen ACK Lysis buffer for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Dilute out the ACK Buffer with...
steps.instruction: Dilute out the ACK Buffer with equal or greater volume of T cell media. Spin down T cells down @ 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in T cell media
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in T cell media. Volume of T cells:

steps.title: Add 1ug/ml of anti-CD3 and anti-CD28 (e
steps.instruction: Add 1ug/ml of anti-CD3 and anti-CD28 (e.g. 20ul of Ab per 10 mL of splenocytes). Anti-CD3 added: Anti-CD28 added:

steps.title: Add 50 IU/mL of IL-2 (e
steps.instruction: Add 50 IU/mL of IL-2 (e.g. 10ul of Ab per 10 mL splenocytes). IL-2 added:

steps.title: Transfer 10mL of splenocytes per T25...
steps.instruction: Transfer 10mL of splenocytes per T25 flask and place in 37C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Transfer T cells into 50mL tubes...
steps.instruction: Transfer T cells into 50mL tubes (need 1 tube for each independent viral transduction . Number of tubes:

steps.title: Harvest virus from PLAT-E plates and filter through 0
steps.instruction: Harvest virus from PLAT-E plates and filter through 0.45um Nalgene Syringe Filter.

steps.title: Add 10
steps.instruction: Add 10.5 mL T cell media per PLAT-E plate and return to 32C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Resuspend T cells in filtered viral supernatant
steps.instruction: Resuspend T cells in filtered viral supernatant. Calculate volume of each tube. Volumes:

steps.title: Add IL-2 at 50 IU/mL and Polybrene at 5ug/mL
steps.instruction: Add IL-2 at 50 IU/mL and Polybrene at 5ug/mL. Volume of IL-2 added to each tube: Volume of Polybrene added to each tube:

steps.title: Plate T cell/virus mixture in 12...
steps.instruction: Plate T cell/virus mixture in 12 well plates (Add approximately 1.5-2 mL per well). Balance the plates by weight. Spin @ 1000 xg for 90 minutes at 30C.

steps.title: Place plates in 37C incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Place plates in 37C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Collect T cells from wells, combine...
steps.instruction: Collect T cells from wells, combine similar wells into 50 mL tube, and spin down @1350 RPM for 4-5 min at 4C.

steps.title: Harvest virus from PLAT-E plates and filter through 0
steps.instruction: Harvest virus from PLAT-E plates and filter through 0.45um Nalgene Syringe Filter.

steps.title: Resuspend T cells in filtered viral supernatant
steps.instruction: Resuspend T cells in filtered viral supernatant. Calculate volume of each tube. Volumes:

steps.title: Add IL-2 at 50 IU/mL and Polybrene at 5ug/mL
steps.instruction: Add IL-2 at 50 IU/mL and Polybrene at 5ug/mL. Volume of IL-2 added to each tube: Volume of Polybrene added to each tube:

steps.title: Plate T cell/virus mixture in 12 well plates (~1
steps.instruction: Plate T cell/virus mixture in 12 well plates (~1.5-2.5 mL per well). Balance the plates by weight. Spin @ 1000 xg for 90 minutes at 30C.

steps.title: Place plates in 37C incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Place plates in 37C incubator overnight.
1. If the wells are starting to change from oragne to yellow in color, add 1-2 mL of T cell media per well of cells. 2. Add 50 IU/ml IL-2 per well.
1. Remove a small sample of cells for screening. 2. Continue to add media (ass needed) and IL-2 (50 IU/ml) every 48 hours.
